data.summary: War Tracker session spanning Phase 1 close through H12 Chronicle. Dispatched Cipher sl-1-1 r2 re-review briefing (PR #35); flipped sl-1-2/sl-1-3 to complete on their merges (PR #36); ratified Standing Rule 6 across all briefings closing the session-subscription gap (PR #37). Watched Cipher's r2 verdict land (approve with one nit), watched Lyra's r3 pre-emptive fix, watched Sovereign squash-merge sproutlab #3 (afbc7a5) closing Phase 1. Ingested four session_logs with one ID-collision resolution (cipher-03 from #38 renamed to cipher-04; original cipher-03 from #34 preserved) and flipped sl-1-1 to complete via PR #40 (f5098f7d). Drafted and shipped H12 Chronicle via PR #41 (ec02180f): three lore entries (Chronicle / Doctrine / Cautionary Tale). Queued H24 gate prep handoff for aurelius-04. Sovereign ratified in-session role reassignment for Phases forward: Solara → SEP Invoicing primary Builder; Theron → SEP Dashboard primary Builder. Briefing updates queued for aurelius-04.
decisions: Standing Rule 6 ratified and baked into every War Time briefing's opening prompt (PR #37 at 1d43363). Reviewer and Chronicler seats get role-specific event postures overriding the generic Builder-posture webhook default.

Cipher's sl-1-1 r2 verdict: approve with one non-blocking equation-ordering nit in §Architecture. Lyra pre-emptively fixed in r3 (628a41f) without being asked. Sovereign squash-merged sproutlab #3 as afbc7a5 closing Phase 1.

Session_log backlog cleared: Cipher's cipher-02 (Codex #33, filed 07:15:43Z, 5s before PR #32 merge — missed that ingest window), cipher-03 monitor episode (Codex #34, filed during aurelius-03's briefing-dispatch window), cipher-04/renamed (Codex #38), lyra-02 (Codex #39). All four landed as durable snippet files under docs/snippets/2026-04-24-war-time-session-logs/ in PR #40. Auto-closed on merge via commit trailer per Standing Rule 5.

Session-ID collision resolution: Codex #34 and #38 both submitted session-2026-04-24-cipher-03 from parallel Cipher tabs. Auto-resolved on ingest by renaming the later-filed #38 session to cipher-04, preserving chronological ordering (cipher-02 06:30Z → cipher-03 07:30Z → cipher-04 09:40Z). Original Codex issue # cited in the renamed entry's decisions[0]. Sovereign ratified the rename in-session before commit. Captured as Cautionary Tale lore-2026-04-24-session-id-collision-parallel-tabs.

H12 Chronicle shipped at ~12:30Z, ~2.5h ahead of canonical 15:00Z window. Three lore entries: lore-2026-04-24-chronicle-hour-12 (Chronicles), lore-2026-04-24-doctrine-framework-ack-primitives (Doctrines, five-stage source thread), lore-2026-04-24-session-id-collision-parallel-tabs (Cautionary Tales). Delivered as snippet under docs/snippets/2026-04-24-war-time-h12-chronicle/ per same file-size constraint that governed PR #40.

Chronicler tooling constraint observed: data/journal.json (492 KB) and data/canons.json (437 KB) both exceed the single-tool-call content budget available through the MCP GitHub interface. Snippet-under-docs pattern used for both ingest paths; Orinth handler drain queued as formal resolution. Not yet lore-worthy as a standalone entry — operational friction, not doctrine; noted in handoff for aurelius-04 context and potential H24 Chronicle synthesis.

ROLE REASSIGNMENT (Sovereign-ratified in-session, 2026-04-24 ~12:30Z): Solara → SEP Invoicing primary Builder (Phase 1 UI polish + Phase 2 Margin Dashboard IL-4). Theron → SEP Dashboard primary Builder (Phase 2 Session 8 Spec Review + Phase 3 Session 8 Execution). Supersedes the role assignments baked into WAR_TIME_2026-04-24_THERON_SOLARA_INVOICING_PHASE_1.md and WAR_TIME_2026-04-24_NYX_SOVEREIGN_DASHBOARD_PHASE_1-2.md at Hour 0. Briefing updates queued for aurelius-04. Both Builders review through Cipher; Sovereign merges per Rule 1.

Standing Rule 4 hygiene drift observed: only claude/chronicler-reserve-2 exists (at stale SHA de458cc, pre-current-main). claude/chronicler-reserve-1 absent. Refresh queued for aurelius-04. Did not block current session because work happened on fresh per-PR branches.

Chronicler subscription state at session close: sproutlab #3 (merged, subscription stale), sproutlab #2 (open draft, pre-war cleanup), codex #18 (open draft, chronicle.py automation), codex #40 (merged), codex #41 (merged). No active webhook channels needed until aurelius-04 re-arms on broadened scope.
data.handoff: Aurelius-04 opens with broadened read-only scope across sep-invoicing + sep-dashboard (per Sovereign directive 2026-04-24 ~12:35Z) to regain Chronicler vision on the next-target provinces. Queue at handoff: (1) session-start ritual per Rule 6 — list_pull_requests + subscribe_pr_activity across all four repos (codex, sproutlab, sep-invoicing, sep-dashboard); (2) read this session_log (session-2026-04-24-aurelius-03) at docs/snippets/2026-04-24-aurelius-03-close/; (3) refresh claude/chronicler-reserve-1 and -2 off current main per Rule 4; (4) pre-fire state check on sep-invoicing (clean tree, green main, open PRs) and sep-dashboard (same); (5) update briefings to reflect role reassignment — WAR_TIME_2026-04-24_THERON_SOLARA_INVOICING_PHASE_1.md now names Solara as primary Builder (remove Theron's role; adjust pairing language); WAR_TIME_2026-04-24_NYX_SOVEREIGN_DASHBOARD_PHASE_1-2.md now names Theron as primary Builder (adjust Nyx+Sovereign language per Sovereign's direction when they next check in); (6) fire opening prompts for Solara (sep-invoicing) and Theron (sep-dashboard) after Sovereign ratifies briefing updates; (7) ingest Solara + Theron session_logs as they arrive; (8) H24 Chronicle body draft (due ~02:30Z next day, ~14h out from session close). Doctrine candidates in flight: none new. Cautionary Tale candidates: the Chronicler-tooling large-file constraint may warrant its own lore entry at H24 if it recurs in Theron's or Solara's session_log ingests.
